data.title: Qogir Disc Golf Resistance Trainer Band System Opened Never Used
data.description:
Disc golf is a game of muscle memory, and the Qogir resistance trainer is built to develop exactly that. You anchor the strap to a door or tree, grab the trainer disc, and work through your backhand or forehand motion against resistance bands. Three resistance levels let you progress as your muscles adapt. The softer grippy disc feels closer to a real disc golf disc than the hard plastic on competing trainers. I bought it, set it aside, and never made time for it. Opened and fully intact, never used.

Brand | Qogir
Type | Disc golf resistance band trainer
Resistance Levels | 3 (light, medium, heavy)
Anchor | Door frame or tree strap included
Trains | Backhand and forehand throwing motion
Best For | Building arm speed, form correction, muscle memory
Condition | Opened, never used, all components present

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Opened but never used. All components present. Bought new on Amazon, sat in storage. No damage.
